name: Prompt Building & Context Assembly
description: Assembles full AI prompts from modular blocks: system instructions, project rules, MCP configuration, feature context, skills, and user input. Also handles context reduction for token-limit retries and deduplication of repeated context.

patterns: Cache-keyed context deduplication for team tasks
Composable markdown prompt blocks loaded from embedded resources
Retry-aware context reduction with priority-based section pruning
dependencies: Loads .md blocks via PromptLoader from embedded resources
